description: Real capture (2026-07-09, SDK 0.3.206). A 12s foreground turn gets TWO queued messages (command_lifecycle:queued frames present), then the session is interrupted via POST /interrupt. KEY PROPERTY: the inbound stream simply STOPS — no cancelled/discarded lifecycle frames, no post-interrupt idle arrive; the host must synthesize session_idle itself (markSessionInterrupted). This is the evidence base for adopting the interrupt() typed receipt (still_queued): the wire carries no queued-fate information today. Replay must not hang or double-finalize.
